caption:
START-TIME UPDATE FOR THE MIAMI GRAND PRIX! ⏰

Due to heavy storms in the forecast, the start has been moved up by three hours.
author: motorsportcom

caption:
Following discussions between FIA, F1 and the Miami promoter, the decision has been taken to move the start of Sunday’s Miami Grand Prix to 13:00 local time in Miami due to the weather forecast that is expected to bring heavier rainstorms later in the afternoon, close to the original planned race start time

caption: Toto Wolff shared some powerful words on racing legend Alex Zanardi. ❤️
author: motorsportcom

caption: In memory of a racing legend. ❤️
author: motorsportcom

caption: Tributes from across the racing world have come in to remember the life of Alex Zanardi. He will be deeply missed.
author: motorsportcom

caption: Just a reminder Max Verstappen has more wins on American soil than any driver in F1 history.
author: motorsportcom

caption:
👀 

#f1 #f12026 #formula1 #formulaone #miamigp
author: f1wow

caption:
The word “legend” doesn’t even begin to describe Alex Zanardi. He was a two-time CART champion with a life defined by an unbreakable will. 

After the 2001 crash that took his legs, Alex Zanardi’s racing fire never dimmed. He became a 6-time Paralympic medalist and even returned to compete behind the wheel less than two years later. He raced through 2019.

A hero of the sport. Rest in peace.

caption:
Our season starts this week! 
Join us on Patreon on Tuesday, 3rd March, for a close look at all the details in our 2026 liveries. 

And on Youtube on Wednesday, 4th March for our season opener episode. (It’s the longest video we’ve ever made(/making, still working on it).

This marks the first major evolutionary upgrade for our characters since 2020. Excited for a new season!
